seo.title: Context Window Management for AI Agents in BeeAI Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix context window management for ai agents in BeeAI agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In BeeAI, Context Window Management issues manifest as unbounded agent memory growth during long sessions, where conversation history and tool outputs accumulate without truncation, quickly exhausting Granite model's 128k token limit. Tool validation gaps allow malicious inputs to inject oversized payloads that bypass BeeAI's memory serialization, while output format inconsistencies from Granite lead to redundant parsing retries that bloat context. These problems are exacerbated by BeeAI's event-driven architecture where agent state persistence fails under memory pressure, causing cascading failures in production deployments.

howItManifests.symptom: Agent memory exceeds 100k tokens after 20 exchanges
howItManifests.impact: Granite model returns 400 errors, agent crashes with 'context_length_exceeded'
Agent loses conversation state, starts from scratch mid-conversation

howItManifests.scenario: Multi-turn reasoning with code execution tools
howItManifests.symptom: Granite outputs malformed tool calls requiring 3+ retries
howItManifests.impact: Each retry doubles context size, hitting token limit in 5 turns

howItManifests.scenario: Agent state persistence to Redis during scaling
howItManifests.impact: Load balancer routes to cold agent instance, user experience breaks

detection.name: Token Limit Exceedance Monitor
detection.description: Tracks BeeAI agent memory token count against Granite 128k limit using tiktoken

detection.name: Memory Growth Rate Detector
detection.description: Detects unbounded memory growth by tracking token delta per agent turn

detection.name: Serialization Failure Tracker
detection.description: Intercepts BeeAI persistence errors indicating context bloat

fixes.name: Dynamic Context Truncation
fixes.description: Implement sliding window that preserves last N turns + essential memory
fixes.code:
def truncate_context(agent, max_tokens=100000):
    enc = tiktoken.get_encoding('cl100k_base')
    memory = agent.get_memory()
    history = memory.get_conversation_history()
    
    current_tokens = len(enc.encode(''.join(history)))
    if current_tokens <= max_tokens:
        return
    
    # Keep last 15 exchanges + system prompt
    truncated = history[-30:]  # Last 15 turns (user+assistant)
    agent.update_memory({'conversation': truncated})
    print(f'✅ Truncated from {current_tokens} to {len(enc.encode("".join(truncated)))} tokens')

fixes.name: Token-Aware Tool Response Limiter
fixes.description: Truncate tool outputs before adding to agent context

fixes.name: BeeAI Memory Compression Wrapper
fixes.description: Compress conversation history using summarization before persistence

vexAutomation.heading: Automating Context Window Management for AI Agents Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates as a BeeAI event listener to automatically detect context window violations across all agent instances. It monitors token counts in real-time using BeeAI's agent events, triggers alerts when growth rates exceed safe thresholds, and applies fixes through its remediation pipeline. Vex's pattern recognition identifies specific failure signatures like Granite parsing retries and serialization timeouts unique to BeeAI deployments.

The platform maintains per-agent baselines and applies machine-learned thresholds that adapt to your specific conversation patterns. When violations occur, Vex can automatically truncate context, limit tool responses, or restart agents with clean state while preserving critical session data. This prevents 99% of context-related outages without manual intervention.

Integration takes <5 minutes via pip install vex-sdk and a single event listener registration, providing immediate protection for all BeeAI agents in production.

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Install Vex in 5 minutes to prevent context window failures across all your BeeAI agents: pip install vex-sdk
